title: little-loops Configuration
description: Configuration schema for little-loops development workflow plugin

categories.description: Issue category definitions. Required categories (bugs, features, enhancements) are automatically included if not specified. Custom categories are merged with required ones.

deferred_dir.description: Directory for deferred issues (parked, not active or completed)

capture_template.description: Creation variant for issues assembled by skills (capture-issue, format-issue, ready-issue)

exact_threshold.description: Jaccard similarity threshold above which a finding is treated as an exact duplicate (skip)

similar_threshold.description: Jaccard similarity threshold above which a finding is treated as similar (update existing issue)

idle_timeout_seconds.description: Seconds of inactivity before automation considers the session idle. 0 disables.

max_continuations.description: Maximum number of continuation prompts before automation stops.

parallel.description: Parallel automation settings with git worktree isolation (ll-parallel)

p0_sequential.description: Process P0 issues sequentially (not in parallel)

state_file.description: State file for parallel processing resume

max_merge_retries.description: Maximum rebase attempts before failing merge

stream_subprocess_output.description: Stream Claude CLI output to console

worktree_copy_files.description: Additional files to copy from main repo to worktrees (relative paths). Includes .claude/settings.local.json by default because it carries Claude Code auth tokens required in each worktree. Note: .claude/ directory is always copied automatically.

require_code_changes.description: Require worktree to produce code changes before merging. Skips no-op runs.

use_feature_branches.description: Create a dedicated feature branch per issue (e.g., feature/ENH-123-slug) instead of the default parallel/<id>-<timestamp> branch. When true, auto-merge to main is skipped and branches survive as PR-ready. Use for PR-based CI/CD workflows.

remote_name.description: Git remote name used for fetch/pull operations in parallel runs. Use if your remote is not named 'origin'.

confidence_gate.description: Confidence score gate for manage-issue implementation phase

enabled.description: Enable confidence score gate before implementation

readiness_threshold.description: Minimum confidence_score (readiness, 0-100) required to proceed with implementation

outcome_threshold.description: Minimum outcome_confidence (0-100) required to proceed with implementation

tdd_mode.description: Enable TDD mode: write failing tests before implementation in manage-issue

max_refine_count.description: Maximum total lifetime /ll:refine-issue calls allowed per issue. Enforced by the refine-to-ready-issue loop via ll-issues refine-status.

focus_dirs.description: Directories to focus on during scans

exclude_patterns.description: Glob patterns to exclude from scans

mode.description: Optimization mode (quick uses config only, thorough spawns agent)

confirm.description: Show diff and ask for confirmation before applying

bypass_prefix.description: Prefix to bypass optimization (e.g., * to skip)

clarity_threshold.description: Minimum clarity score (1-10) to pass through unchanged

auto_detect_on_session_start.description: Check for continuation prompt when session starts

include_todos.description: Include todo list state in continuation prompt

include_git_status.description: Include git status in continuation prompt

include_recent_files.description: Include recently modified files in continuation prompt

max_continuations.description: Maximum automatic session continuations for CLI tools

prompt_expiry_hours.description: Hours before continuation prompt is considered stale

context_monitor.description: Proactive context monitoring with automatic handoff before hitting limits

enabled.description: Enable proactive context monitoring with auto-handoff

auto_handoff_threshold.description: Estimated context usage percentage to trigger automatic handoff (0-100)

estimate_weights.description: Weight factors for context estimation heuristics

tool_call_base.description: Base tokens per tool call overhead

bash_output_per_char.description: Estimated tokens per character of bash output

per_turn_overhead.description: Tokens added per tool call to account for Claude output and user message tokens

system_prompt_baseline.description: One-time token estimate for system prompt (CLAUDE.md, skills, etc.) added on first tool call

context_limit_estimate.description: Fallback/override for the context window token limit. Auto-detection reads the model from the JSONL transcript and selects the correct limit for known models (claude-*-4* → 200000). Set this only to override auto-detection or when using an unknown/custom model.

state_file.description: File to track context usage state

post_compaction_percent.description: After context compaction, reset token estimate to this percentage of context_limit_estimate as a safety margin

use_transcript_baseline.description: Use JSONL transcript usage fields as accurate baseline for token estimation (one-turn lag). Falls back to pure heuristics if transcript is unavailable.

scratch_pad.description: Observation masking via scratch pad files to reduce context bloat in automation sessions (disabled by default)

enabled.description: Enable scratch pad instructions for automation sessions

threshold_lines.description: Line count threshold above which tool outputs are redirected to scratch files

documents.description: Key document tracking by category for issue alignment validation

product.description: Product/business analysis configuration (opt-in feature, disabled by default)

analyze_user_impact.description: Include user impact assessment in issues

analyze_business_value.description: Include business value scoring in issues

goals_discovery.description: Settings for auto-discovering product goals from documentation

max_files.description: Maximum markdown files to analyze for goal discovery

required_files.description: Files that must exist for discovery (warning if missing)

default_timeout.description: Default timeout per issue in seconds

default_max_workers.description: Default worker count for parallel execution within waves

loops_dir.description: Directory for loop definitions and runtime state

glyphs.description: Override unicode badge glyphs shown in FSM box diagrams. Omitted keys use built-in defaults.

refine_status.description: Display settings for the ll-issues refine-status command

columns.description: Ordered list of columns to display in refine-status table output. Valid names: id, priority, title, source, norm, fmt, ready, confidence, total. Unknown names render as —. Omit or leave empty to use the default column set.

elide_order.description: Ordered list of columns to drop (first to last) when the table exceeds terminal width. Columns absent from this list are treated as pinned and never elided. id, priority, and title are always pinned by the implementation. Command columns not listed are dropped rightmost-first after this list is exhausted. Omit or leave empty to use the default elision order.

dependency_mapping.description: Dependency mapping threshold configuration for overlap detection and conflict scoring

overlap_min_files.description: Minimum overlapping files to trigger overlap detection

overlap_min_ratio.description: Minimum ratio of overlapping files to smaller set

min_directory_depth.description: Minimum path segments for directory overlap (e.g., src/components/ = 2)

conflict_threshold.description: Conflict score cutoff: below = parallel-safe, above = dependency proposed

high_conflict_threshold.description: Conflict score above which issues are labeled HIGH conflict

confidence_modifier.description: Confidence reduction applied when dependency direction is ambiguous

scoring_weights.description: Weights for semantic conflict scoring signals (should sum to 1.0)

semantic.description: Weight for semantic target overlap (component/function names)

section.description: Weight for section mention overlap (UI regions)

exclude_common_files.description: Infrastructure files excluded from overlap detection

sync.description: GitHub Issues synchronization settings (opt-in feature, disabled by default)

provider.description: Issue tracking provider (currently only GitHub supported)

repo.description: GitHub repository (owner/repo format, auto-detected if null)

label_mapping.description: Map issue types to GitHub labels

sync_completed.description: Also sync completed issues (close on GitHub)

pull_template.description: Creation variant for issues pulled from GitHub (determines section structure)

color.description: Emit ANSI color codes in CLI output. Set to false for CI or plain-text environments. Also suppressed when the NO_COLOR environment variable is set.

colors.description: Override individual ANSI SGR color codes. Values are raw SGR parameter strings (e.g. "32", "38;5;208"). Unspecified keys retain their defaults.

info.description: ANSI SGR code for info messages (default: cyan)

success.description: ANSI SGR code for success messages (default: green)

warning.description: ANSI SGR code for warning messages (default: yellow)

error.description: ANSI SGR code for error messages (default: orange)

P0.description: ANSI SGR code for P0 (default: bold orange)

P1.description: ANSI SGR code for P1 (default: orange)

P2.description: ANSI SGR code for P2 (default: yellow)

P3.description: ANSI SGR code for P3 (default: normal)

P4.description: ANSI SGR code for P4 (default: dim)

P5.description: ANSI SGR code for P5 (default: dim)

type.description: Colors for issue type labels (BUG, FEAT, ENH).

BUG.description: ANSI SGR code for BUG labels (default: orange)

FEAT.description: ANSI SGR code for FEAT labels (default: green)

ENH.description: ANSI SGR code for ENH labels (default: blue)

fsm_active_state.description: ANSI SGR code for the active FSM state highlight during verbose run (default: green)

fsm_edge_labels.description: ANSI SGR color overrides for FSM transition edge labels in loop diagrams.

yes.description: ANSI SGR code for 'yes' transitions (default: green)

no.description: ANSI SGR code for 'no' transitions (default: orange)

error.description: ANSI SGR code for 'error' transitions (default: red)

partial.description: ANSI SGR code for 'partial' transitions (default: yellow)

next.description: ANSI SGR code for 'next' transitions (default: dim)

default.description: ANSI SGR code for unlabeled ('_') transitions (default: dim)

blocked.description: ANSI SGR code for 'blocked' transitions (default: red)

retry_exhausted.description: ANSI SGR code for 'retry_exhausted' transitions (default: orange)

extensions.description: Extension module paths to load (format: 'module.path:ClassName'). Extensions receive structured events from the EventBus.
